mainEntity.name: Core factors Chicago AI visibility services target for Claude recommendations?
mainEntity.text: Core factors Chicago AI visibility services target for Claude recommendations?

acceptedAnswer.text: E-E-A-T via peer endorsements, Illinois case citations, review patterns, and fresh content. Claude prioritizes authoritative, multi-source legal insights.

suggestedAnswer.text: Chicago services audit for first-party expertise (blogs), experience (verdicts), authoritativeness (bar leadership), trustworthiness (reviews). Target 80/20 content mix. Claude cites comprehensive sources; thin pages ignored. Cost: $4k-8k/quarter. Warn: Inflated claims risk bar scrutiny.
